risk_title: Unresolved upstream dependency may delay delivery
risk_description: Unresolved upstream dependency may delay delivery in the Design Standards workstream. An upstream dependency remains uncertain, high priority, or not yet accepted by the downstream workstream. It is linked to related activity/activity group ACT-001 and related deliverable DEL-001. If this risk materialises, dependent activity/deliverable may slip if upstream item is late, unclear, or not signed off. This affects Design Standards and may compromise DEL-001, downstream sequencing, governance confidence, or readiness for the next delivery gate. Risk owner: Justin. Mitigation: Confirm upstream owner, due date, acceptance criteria, and escalation path. The mitigation must be owned by Justin, linked to DEL-001, and reviewed at each workstream checkpoint until the trigger condition is closed. Contingency: Re-sequence dependent work or escalate for resource/timeline decision. The contingency should be activated if the trigger occurs or if mitigation progress is not evidenced by the next checkpoint. Trigger: Upstream dependency not completed by required date. Treat this as active when the trigger is reached without evidence of closure.
cause: An upstream dependency remains uncertain, high priority, or not yet accepted by the downstream workstream.
impact: If this risk materialises, dependent activity/deliverable may slip if upstream item is late, unclear, or not signed off. This affects Design Standards and may compromise DEL-001, downstream sequencing, governance confidence, or readiness for the next delivery gate.
mitigation_action: Confirm upstream owner, due date, acceptance criteria, and escalation path. The mitigation must be owned by Justin, linked to DEL-001, and reviewed at each workstream checkpoint until the trigger condition is closed.
contingency: Re-sequence dependent work or escalate for resource/timeline decision. The contingency should be activated if the trigger occurs or if mitigation progress is not evidenced by the next checkpoint.
trigger: Upstream dependency not completed by required date. Treat this as active when the trigger is reached without evidence of closure.
related_dependency: Though we have an agreed structure, there is a dependency on brand alignment. Even though there is structure, we may not have stressed tested everything.

risk_description: Low confidence estimate in the Design Standards workstream. An upstream dependency remains uncertain, high priority, or not yet accepted by the downstream workstream. It is linked to related activity/activity group ACT-158 and related deliverable DEL-158. If this risk materialises, dependent activity/deliverable may slip if upstream item is late, unclear, or not signed off. This affects Feature Delivery and may compromise DEL-158, downstream sequencing, governance confidence, or readiness for the next delivery gate. Risk owner: Wayne & Tebogo. Mitigation: Confirm upstream owner, due date, acceptance criteria, and escalation path. The mitigation must be owned by Wayne & Tebogo, linked to DEL-158, and reviewed at each workstream checkpoint until the trigger condition is closed. Contingency: Re-sequence dependent work or escalate for resource/timeline decision. The contingency should be activated if the trigger occurs or if mitigation progress is not evidenced by the next checkpoint. Trigger: Upstream dependency not completed by required date. Treat this as active when the trigger is reached without evidence of closure.
cause: An upstream dependency remains uncertain, high priority, or not yet accepted by the downstream workstream.
impact: If this risk materialises, dependent activity/deliverable may slip if upstream item is late, unclear, or not signed off. This affects Feature Delivery and may compromise DEL-158, downstream sequencing, governance confidence, or readiness for the next delivery gate.
mitigation_action: Confirm upstream owner, due date, acceptance criteria, and escalation path. The mitigation must be owned by Wayne & Tebogo, linked to DEL-158, and reviewed at each workstream checkpoint until the trigger condition is closed.
contingency: Re-sequence dependent work or escalate for resource/timeline decision. The contingency should be activated if the trigger occurs or if mitigation progress is not evidenced by the next checkpoint.
trigger: Upstream dependency not completed by required date. Treat this as active when the trigger is reached without evidence of closure.
related_dependency: Design - Impact of of new templates on Find Advisor flow

risk_description: High-priority item lacks confirmed dates in the Feature Delivery workstream. Accountability is not confirmed for a high-priority work item, which weakens ownership, escalation, and delivery follow-through. It is linked to related activity/activity group ACT-271 and related deliverable DEL-262. If this risk materialises, accountability and escalation path are unclear. This affects OMAR and may compromise DEL-262, downstream sequencing, governance confidence, or readiness for the next delivery gate. Risk owner: To be confirmed. Mitigation: Assign accountable owner before implementation or first governance checkpoint. The mitigation must be owned by To be confirmed, linked to DEL-262, and reviewed at each workstream checkpoint until the trigger condition is closed. Contingency: Escalate to PMO/workstream lead for ownership decision. The contingency should be activated if the trigger occurs or if mitigation progress is not evidenced by the next checkpoint. Trigger: Owner remains unknown at implementation readiness check. Treat this as active when the trigger is reached without evidence of closure.
